title: Best M.Sc in Forensic Sciences Colleges in Noida & Delhi NCR
content: 3 Yr. B.Sc. in Forensic Science, Basic Health or Allied Science with 50% marks in aggregate Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit. The students after completion of the program are eligible for working as forensic professional in government and private forensic science laboratories. Also, the students can opt for joining law firms, MNCs, insurance companies, banks as forensic consultant. The program offers student a wide are of employment opportunities as it has been developed after taking inputs from the members of the industry. 01 Develop a strong foundation in the principles and practices of forensic science, integrating biology, chemistry, law, and investigative techniques. 02 Equip students with practical skills in evidence collection, analysis, interpretation, and documentation using modern laboratory tools and forensic technologies. 03 Foster critical thinking and problem-solving abilities essential for crime scene investigation, forensic reporting, and expert testimony in legal contexts. 04 Promote interdisciplinary knowledge and research to advance forensic applications in criminal justice, public safety, and emerging fields like digital forensics and toxicology. 05 Prepare graduates for professional roles in forensic laboratories, law enforcement agencies, academic research, and legal consultancy, both nationally and internationally. 01 Critical thinking and analytical reasoning: Acquire ability of critical thinking and logical reasoning and capability of recognizing and distinguishing the various aspects of real life problems. 02 Conduct investigations of complex research problems: Use research-based knowledge and research methods including design of experiments, analysis and interpretation of data, and synthesis of the information to provide valid conclusions. 03 Modern tool usage: Create, select, and apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools including prediction and modelling to complex scientific activities with an understanding of the limitations. 04 Communication: Communicate effectively on scientific activities with the community and with society at large, such as, being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations, and give and receive clear instructions. 05 Environment and sustainability: Understand the impact of the professional scientific solutions in societal and environmental contexts, and demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for sustainable development. 06 Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics and responsibilities and norms of the scientific practice. 07 08 Life-long learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability to engage in independent and life-long learning in the broadest context of technological change. 01 The graduates shall be successful professionals in Academia, Industry, Government and Entrepreneurship. 02 The graduate shall effectively address the challenges of the society and undertake the projects for bridging the gap between industry and societal needs. 03 The graduates shall pursue higher education/research at institute of national and international repute. 01 Disciplinary Knowledge: Apply the knowledge of forensic concepts and applications in the field of criminal and civil investigations for the purposes of justice. 02 Problem Analysing: Develop an ability to analyse the evidences, identify and define appropriate solutions and enhance overall protocols and also equip with technological ability and problem solving skills. 03 Formulation and Design: Handle the advanced techniques of science and technology to analyze and design procedures and protocols for solving variety of problems related to real life cases.
